summary: The diff implements Excel export (REQ-1), Excel import (REQ-2), and a downloadable template (REQ-3) on the Inventory page. The core functionality is present, but one acceptance criterion — prompting the user to skip or overwrite duplicate items by name — needs verification. The InventoryPage.tsx summary mentions 'handles duplicates' and there is a 'duplicate dialog' referenced, which suggests it is implemented. All other major requirements appear to be addressed: .xlsx export with bold headers and numeric values, .xlsx import with semicolon/comma delimiter support, row validation with error reporting, inventory refresh after import, and a template with headers and an example row.

hallucinated_features.description: backend/migration.mo file was added with a trivial no-op migration module
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement in the BuildRequest asked for a migration module or any backend migration scaffolding. This file was not requested.
